data_entry_automation.description: Need to automate repetitive data entry tasks

workflow_automation.description: Need to automate multi-step business workflows

spreadsheet_replacement.description: Need to move off spreadsheets into structured systems

reporting_needed.description: Need visibility into business metrics and KPIs

dashboard_needed.description: Need real-time dashboards for operational oversight

crm_needed.description: Need a centralized system to manage customer relationships

project_management_needed.description: Need structured project tracking and task management

process_definition_needed.description: Need to define and enforce standard operating procedures

approval_flows_needed.description: Need structured approval chains for decisions and requests

database_needed.description: Need structured data storage beyond spreadsheets

integration_needed.description: Need to connect disparate tools and data sources

api_orchestration_needed.description: Need programmatic integration and API management

unified_platform_needed.description: Need a single platform to replace fragmented tool stack

helpdesk_needed.description: Need a ticketing system for customer support

ecommerce_needed.description: Need online storefront and order management

marketing_automation_needed.description: Need automated marketing campaigns and lead nurturing

hr_needed.description: Need employee lifecycle and HR process management

payroll_needed.description: Need payroll processing and compliance management

recruiting_needed.description: Need applicant tracking and hiring workflow

collaboration_needed.description: Need team communication and file sharing tools

document_management_needed.description: Need centralized document storage and version control

field_service_needed.description: Need on-site job scheduling and technician dispatch

video_conferencing_needed.description: Need online meetings and webinar capability

survey_needed.description: Need customer or employee feedback collection

social_media_needed.description: Need social media management and scheduling

inventory_needed.description: Need inventory tracking and warehouse management

billing_needed.description: Need invoicing, payments, and billing automation

expense_management_needed.description: Need expense tracking and reimbursement workflows

accounting_needed.description: Need double-entry accounting and financial reporting

solo_productivity.description: Solo operator needing lightweight personal productivity tools

it_management_needed.description: Need IT asset management and identity governance

security_needed.description: Need password management and security controls

learning_management_needed.description: Need employee training and course delivery platform

employee_engagement_needed.description: Need gamification and motivation tools for teams

event_management_needed.description: Need event planning and attendee management

website_needed.description: Need website or landing page builder

customer_engagement_needed.description: Need live chat and visitor tracking for customer engagement

analytics_needed.description: Need advanced cross-functional analytics and BI

remote_support_needed.description: Need remote desktop access and support tools

email_campaigns_needed.description: Need email marketing and newsletter management

appointment_scheduling_needed.description: Need online booking and appointment scheduling

solution_patterns.name: Sales Pipeline + Follow-up Automation
solution_patterns.business_outcome: Convert more leads into deals by ensuring every prospect gets timely, consistent follow-up.
solution_patterns.explanation_template: As a {role} in {industry} with a {size}-person team, your biggest growth lever is a structured sales pipeline. Right now leads are falling through the cracks because there's no system enforcing follow-up. This pattern gives you full pipeline visibility plus automated next-step reminders.

solution_patterns.name: Helpdesk + Customer Context
solution_patterns.business_outcome: Resolve customer issues faster by giving agents full context on every interaction.
solution_patterns.explanation_template: As a {role} in {industry}, your support team is flying blind without customer history. With a {size}-person operation, every repeat-yourself moment costs you trust and time. This pattern connects your helpdesk to your CRM so agents see the full picture before they reply.

solution_patterns.name: Finance + Billing Operations
solution_patterns.business_outcome: Eliminate manual bookkeeping and get real-time visibility into cash flow, expenses, and profitability.
solution_patterns.explanation_template: As a {role} in {industry}, managing finances in spreadsheets or disconnected tools is costing you time and accuracy. At {size} people, you need a system that automates invoicing, tracks expenses, and gives you a live financial picture — not month-end surprises.

solution_patterns.name: Marketing + Lead Nurture
solution_patterns.business_outcome: Turn anonymous visitors into qualified leads and nurture them to purchase with automated multi-channel journeys.
solution_patterns.explanation_template: As a {role} in {industry}, your marketing efforts are scattered. With {size} people, you can't afford to manually chase every lead. This pattern automates the nurture process — from first touch to sales-ready — so your team focuses on the prospects most likely to buy.

solution_patterns.name: Internal Ops + Workflow Automation
solution_patterns.business_outcome: Replace ad-hoc processes with structured, automated workflows that enforce accountability and reduce errors.
solution_patterns.explanation_template: As a {role} in {industry}, your team of {size} is spending too much time on manual processes that should run themselves. This pattern gives you a low-code platform to build exactly the workflows you need, connected to your team chat and file storage.

solution_patterns.name: Field Service + Job Management
solution_patterns.business_outcome: Schedule, dispatch, and track field jobs from quote to invoice without paperwork.
solution_patterns.explanation_template: As a {role} in {industry}, managing field work across {size} people means jobs slip through the cracks if they aren't tracked centrally. This pattern connects your customer records to project scheduling and invoicing so nothing gets lost between the office and the field.

solution_patterns.name: HR + People Management
solution_patterns.business_outcome: Manage the full employee lifecycle — from hiring to payroll to performance — in one connected system.
solution_patterns.explanation_template: As a {role} in {industry} with {size} employees, managing people in spreadsheets is unsustainable. This pattern centralizes HR records, automates leave and attendance, and connects hiring to onboarding so your team spends less time on admin and more on people.

solution_patterns.name: Project Delivery + Client Management
solution_patterns.business_outcome: Deliver client work on time and on budget by connecting project tracking to your sales pipeline and billing.
solution_patterns.explanation_template: As a {role} in {industry} with a {size}-person team, you're juggling client work across tools that don't talk to each other. This pattern connects your CRM pipeline to project delivery and invoicing — so when a deal closes, the project kicks off automatically.

solution_patterns.name: E-commerce + Order Management
solution_patterns.business_outcome: Sell online with a storefront that syncs inventory, payments, and accounting in real time.
solution_patterns.explanation_template: As a {role} in {industry}, you need a storefront that doesn't create more manual work. At {size} people, this pattern gives you integrated commerce — products, inventory, payments, and books all connected — so orders flow through without re-keying data.

solution_patterns.name: Analytics + Business Intelligence
solution_patterns.business_outcome: Make data-driven decisions with cross-functional dashboards that pull from every system you run.
solution_patterns.explanation_template: As a {role} in {industry} with {size} people, you're making decisions based on gut feel because your data is scattered. This pattern gives you a unified analytics layer that blends data from CRM, finance, support, and more into actionable dashboards.

solution_patterns.name: Spreadsheet Replacement + Custom Apps
solution_patterns.business_outcome: Replace fragile spreadsheets with custom apps that enforce data integrity and automate repetitive work.
solution_patterns.explanation_template: As a {role} in {industry}, your team of {size} is running critical operations in spreadsheets that break, get duplicated, and have no audit trail. This pattern replaces them with custom apps that capture data once, enforce rules, and generate reports automatically.

solution_patterns.name: Integration + Connected Stack
solution_patterns.business_outcome: Connect your existing tools into a unified data flow where every system stays in sync automatically.
solution_patterns.explanation_template: As a {role} in {industry}, your {size}-person team is wasting time re-entering data across tools that don't talk to each other. This pattern connects your stack through automated workflows and a central integration layer — so data moves between systems without human intervention.

solution_patterns.name: Collaboration + Knowledge Management
solution_patterns.business_outcome: Give your team one place to communicate, share files, and manage work — so knowledge doesn't live in inboxes.
solution_patterns.explanation_template: As a {role} in {industry} with {size} people, information is scattered across email, chat, and shared drives. This pattern centralizes communication, documents, and project work — so your team can find what they need and collaborate without switching tools.

solution_patterns.name: Recruiting + Onboarding
solution_patterns.business_outcome: Hire faster and ramp new employees to productivity with a connected pipeline from job post to first-day checklist.
solution_patterns.explanation_template: As a {role} in {industry}, hiring at {size} people means every open role costs you output. This pattern streamlines the pipeline — from posting the job, to signing the offer, to onboarding with training courses — so new hires are productive from day one.

solution_patterns.name: Document Management + E-signature
solution_patterns.business_outcome: Create, share, sign, and store documents in one secure workflow — no more emailing PDFs back and forth.
solution_patterns.explanation_template: As a {role} in {industry}, your team of {size} is spending too much time chasing signatures and tracking document versions. This pattern gives you a single flow from document creation to e-signature to secure storage — with audit trails at every step.
